# Little Minds

> Free, non-profit children's mental health and wellbeing resource for kids, teens, and parents. Made by Bode Munk. No tracking, no accounts, COPPA-compliant.

Little Minds offers plain-language guides, calming activities, conversation starters for parents, and crisis support links for 30+ countries. Content is written for children, teenagers, and the adults who care for them.

## Main sections

- [Home](/): Overview and entry points for kids, parents, and learners.
- [For Kids and Teens](/kid): Topic cards, activity toolkit, and a breathing tool.
- [For Parents](/parent): Quick guide, conversation starters, professional support, tools, and a weekly dashboard.
- [Learn About It](/learn): Plain-language guides to anxiety, sleep, stress, sadness, anger, bullying, grief, and more.
- [About Us](/about): Who made Little Minds and why.
- [Contact](/contact): Send a message via the contact form.
- [Donate](/donate): Support the project.

## Kid topic pages

- [Anxiety (kids)](/kid/anxiety): Ideas and skills for feeling worried a lot.
- [Stress about school (kids)](/kid/stress)
- [Sad or low (kids)](/kid/sad)
- [Trouble sleeping (kids)](/kid/sleep)
- [Family or friend conflict (kids)](/kid/conflict)
- [Online or social media pressure (kids)](/kid/socialmedia)
- [Feeling angry a lot (kids)](/kid/anger)
- [Body image worries (kids)](/kid/bodyimage)
- [Bullying (kids)](/kid/bullying)
- [Grief and loss (kids)](/kid/grief)
- [Activity Toolkit](/kid/try-this): Breathing, journaling, gratitude, mindfulness with progress tracking.
- [Take a Breath](/kid/breathe): Interactive breathing tool and 5-4-3-2-1 grounding.
